verses.1: Behold, the LORD’s hand is not shortened, that it can’t save;
verses.2: But your iniquities have separated you and your God,
verses.3: For your hands are defiled with blood,
verses.8: They don’t know the way of peace;
verses.9: Therefore justice is far from us,
verses.10: We grope for the wall like the blind.
verses.12: For our transgressions are multiplied before you,
verses.16: He saw that there was no man,
verses.17: He put on righteousness as a breastplate,
verses.19: So they will fear the LORD’s name from the west,
verses.21: “As for me, this is my covenant with them,” says the LORD. “My Spirit who is on you, and my words which I have put in your mouth shall not depart out of your mouth, nor out of the mouth of your offspring, nor out of the mouth of your offspring’s offspring,” says the LORD, “from now on and forever.”
